params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 mistral V5-B escalation per #695 verdict (V5-A INSUFFICIENT, TRPCClientError persists). HP-Mistral-2: tRPC v11 single-result shape. V5-B replaces [{result:...}] with {result:...} (no array wrapper). Spec: proposals/mistral-trpc-envelope-shape-refinement-spec-2026-05-06.md.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — observe POST /api/trpc/message.newChat?batch=1 response
3. Check response BODY (not just headers): is it {...} object or [{...}] array?
4. Console: TRPCClientError gone? OR new error type?

verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_engine_only: engine fires but bubble silent — escalate V5-C/D
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine response OR new fatal error

notes: 48차 mistral V5-B test — HP-Mistral-2 tRPC v11 single-result shape escalation per #695 PARTIAL verdict.
